mapper.select: SELECT wanted_id, user_id, book_title, author, isbn, cover_image, description, max_price, status, view_count, create_time, update_time, deleted FROM book_wanted WHERE wanted_id = #{wantedId} AND deleted = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE book_wanted SET view_count = COALESCE(view_count, 0) + 1 WHERE wanted_id = #{wantedId} AND deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO book_wanted ( user_id, book_title, author, isbn, description, max_price, status, create_time, update_time, deleted, cover_image ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{bookTitle}, #{author}, #{isbn}, #{description}, #{maxPrice}, #{status}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, #{deleted}, #{coverImage} )
